common.tagline: Run your entire service company from one AI-powered platform.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to your FieldOS AI account.
auth.registerSubtitle: 14 days free. No credit card required.
auth.resetSent: Check your email for a reset link.

onboarding.tradeSubtitle: Pick the one that fits best — you can change this later.
onboarding.inviteLater: Skip for now, I'll invite my team later
onboarding.name: Name
onboarding.integrationsSubtitle: All optional — you can set these up later in Settings.
onboarding.provisionTwilio: Add an AI receptionist phone number
onboarding.planSubtitle: Start with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

dashboard.noAttentionItems: You're all caught up — nothing needs attention right now.
dashboard.welcomeBody: Here's where everything lives — want a 60-second tour?
dashboard.revenueTrendEmpty: Paid invoices will chart here as money comes in.
dashboard.winRateEmpty: Win rate appears once quotes are accepted or rejected.
dashboard.jobsByStatusEmpty: Your jobs will break down here by status.
dashboard.leadPipelineEmpty: Leads will appear here, grouped by AI score.

customers.title: Customers
customers.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone, email or address
customers.empty: No customers yet. Add your first customer to start building your book of business.
customers.name: Name
customers.noHistory: No history yet — estimates, jobs and invoices will appear here.
customers.autoSummaryPending: A summary is generated automatically after this customer's next job or invoice.
customers.deleteDescription: This permanently removes the customer and all their properties, and cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.monthlyOverheadHint: Used to allocate overhead evenly across jobs in the Finance dashboard.
settings.voiceReceptionistBody: Provision a number, set your greeting and routing. Built in Phase 3.
settings.notificationsBody: Choose which events notify you and on which channel (in-app, WhatsApp, SMS, email). Built in Phase 6.
settings.integrationsBody: Connect Stripe, Twilio and your Google Business Profile. Rolled out across Phases 2–3.
settings.leadCaptureBody: Capture enquiries from your website. Every submission lands in your Leads inbox, scored automatically.
settings.widgetDescription: A “Get a quote” button visitors can use to send you a lead.
settings.widgetSnippetHint: Paste this just before </body> on your site:
settings.platformFeeNote: FieldOS AI takes a {fee} fee on payments processed through the platform. Bank transfer and cash payments marked manually are never charged a fee.

leads.title: Leads
leads.description: Enquiries from calls, WhatsApp, your website and manual entry — scored automatically.
leads.emptyBody: Leads from calls, WhatsApp, and your website will show up here. You can also add one by hand.
leads.readOnlyAccess: You have read-only access to leads.
leads.lostReasonPlaceholder: Why was it lost? e.g. went with a cheaper quote, no longer needed
leads.leadAdded: Lead added — we're scoring it now.
leads.jobDescriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Boiler making a banging noise, no hot water since this morning

calls.title: Calls
calls.description: Calls handled by your AI receptionist — each one captured, summarised and turned into a lead.
calls.emptyBody: When your AI receptionist answers a call, it'll appear here with a summary and the caller's details.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.description: Your team's day at a glance. Assign unscheduled jobs to a technician and time slot.
schedule.optimiseSuccess: Route optimised for the shortest drive.
schedule.moveJobConfirm: Move {bumpJob} to tomorrow and insert {emergencyJob} with {technician} at {time}?

materials.title: Materials
materials.description: Track stock and draft restock requests when something runs low.
materials.emptyBody: Add the materials you use most so FieldOS can track stock and help you reorder before you run out.
materials.lowStock: {count} item(s) at or below the reorder threshold.
materials.name: Name
materials.noSupplierEmail: No supplier email on file — copy this request and send it however you like.

finance.title: Finance
finance.description: Profit by job, technician, service and customer — from paid invoices.
finance.emptyBody: Once you mark an invoice paid, FieldOS works out the job's profit and it'll show up here.
finance.overheadNote: Overhead is allocated evenly across jobs this month — for exact figures, consult your accountant.
finance.cfoScope: Scoped to your financial data — revenue, profit, margins, and quote performance.
finance.suggestionProfitTrend: What's my profit trend this quarter?
finance.suggestionMostProfitable: Which service line is most profitable?
finance.suggestionTechCompare: How does each technician compare on profit?

reviews.title: Reviews
reviews.description: Ask happy customers for a review, and catch unhappy ones before they post.

team.title: Team
team.description: Invite people, set what they can access, and manage who's active.
team.emptyBody: Invite technicians, dispatchers and office staff to work together in FieldOS.

estimates.title: Estimates
estimates.newEstimateDescription: Speak, type or photograph the job — FieldOS drafts a priced quote.
estimates.emptyBody: Create your first AI-drafted quote — by voice, text or a photo of the job.
estimates.readyToShare: Quote is ready — copy the link to share it.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.emptyBody: Invoices are created from completed jobs or accepted estimates.
invoices.readyToShare: Invoice ready — copy the link to share it.
invoices.markPaidDescription: Use this for bank transfer or cash payments. No platform fee is charged on manually-marked payments.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.emptyBody: Jobs are created automatically when a customer accepts a quote.
jobs.completeToInvoice: Mark the job complete to raise an invoice.

tech.nothingScheduledBody: When the office books you a job, it'll show up here.
tech.copilotIntro: Ask me anything about the job in front of you. I stick to trade know-how — for scheduling or pricing, check with the office.
tech.copilotSuggestion1: How do I bleed a radiator?
tech.copilotSuggestion2: What size cable for a 32A circuit?
tech.copilotSuggestion3: Why is this boiler showing a fault code?
tech.copilotPhotoError: Use a PNG or JPEG photo.
tech.photoSavedOffline: Saved — it'll upload when you're back online.
tech.reportSavedOffline: Saved — your report will upload when you're back online.
tech.reportPlaceholder: Describe what you did, parts used, anything to follow up…
tech.micError: Couldn't access the mic — you can type the report instead.
tech.signOffNote: Completing notifies the office so they can send the invoice.
tech.signFirst: Ask the customer to sign first.
tech.locationHint: Lets the office see where you are while you work. Only while this app is open.
tech.locationUnavailable: Location isn't available on this device.
tech.offlineBanner: You're offline — showing your saved jobs. Photos & reports will upload when you're back online.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.noAccess: You don't have access to this.
errors.noAccessBody: Ask your account owner if you think this is a mistake.
